creator: david.guyot@europecamions-interactive.com
text:
Hello, there.

I'm trying to upgrade lsof using an up-to-date ports tree, and receive an error:
root@Bitra /u/p/s/lsof {⌗0/⬓49}[1]♆# portmaster -mMAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes sysutils/lsof
                                                                                    
===>>> Currently installed version: lsof-4.90.g,8                                   
===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/sysutils/lsof                                     
                                                                                    
===>>> Gathering distinfo list for installed ports

Stop.                                                                                                                                  
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/lsof                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                       
===>>> make build failed for sysutils/lsof                                                                                             
===>>> Aborting update                                                                                                                 
                                                                                                                                       
                                                                                                                                       
===>>> You can restart from the point of failure with this command line:                                                               
       portmaster <flags> sysutils/lsof

This is far above my C level, but I'll provide additional data if requested; this was executed using MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes as the first attempt to portsnap sysutils/lsof failed with the same error, telling to try this option, which proved uneffective as you can see.

Note that I launched make clean in /usr/ports/sysutils/lsof before trying to portsnap; make install wasn't better.

Awaiting your answers,

Regards.
